title: sacciolepis indica var. oryzetorum
intro: Sacciolepis indica var. oryzetorum, also known as rice grass or rice lemongrass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sacciolepis indica var. oryzetorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are used to treat various health conditions, including colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
